input.background: Suppose on five consecutive days in a given month the number of customers who enter services at a printing shop were 48, 60, 78, 56, and 73.
input.question: Test the null hypothesis that the expected numbers of customers per day were the same on the five days at the 5% level of significance using the Chi-square test.

output.answer: The number of customers who enter the restaurant per day were not the same on the five days at the $5 \%$ level of significance.
